name: Search Submit Button
notes: Button is type='submit' inside a <form onSubmit={handleSubmit}> — keyboard Enter also triggers the same handler.
Empty or whitespace-only queries are silently ignored client-side; no API call is made.
App.handleSearch delegates to DocumentGrid via an imperative React ref (documentGridRef?.handleSearch); if the ref is null the call is silently swallowed.
The backend search path always executes a PostgreSQL ILIKE on documents_v2.name; the IndexManager index-availability branch is dead code (indexReady is hardcoded false).
